message:
The other day, as I was prepping for a potential storm, I found myself digging through the old board games in the closet. It's funny how, in the hustle of everyday life, we can forget about those simple joys. We set up a game night with the kids, complete with popcorn and cozy blankets. It turned into one of those evenings filled with laughter, good-natured competition, and a reminder that we don't always need screens to have fun.

While we were enjoying our time together, I realized that having a few low-tech activities on hand can really lighten the mood, especially when the weather outside gets a bit wild. Plus, it’s a great way to bond and keep everyone’s spirits up! 

Have you rediscovered any old favorites during your own storm prep? This little refresher helped me remember how fun simple can be!
